sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check state after clicking (44,51)
seg = current_frame.segmentation

print(f"State: {last_action_result.get('state', 'N/A')}")
print(f"Game over: {last_action_result.get('game_over', 'N/A')}")

# Find 20px objects
print("\n20px objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 20:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']} 20px at ({cr},{cc})")

# Find 12px objects
print("\n12px objects:")
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['pixels'] == 12:
        cr = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        cc = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary'])//len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  {n['color']} 12px at ({cr},{cc})")

# Check p 20px adjacency
p_20px = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['pixels'] == 20 and n['color'] == 'p']
if p_20px:
    p_id = seg['nodes'].index(p_20px[0])
    print(f"\np 20px adjacent to:")
    for pair in seg['adjacency_list']:
        if pair[0] == p_id or pair[1] == p_id:
            other_id = pair[1] if pair[0] == p_id else pair[0]
            other = seg['nodes'][other_id]
            cr = sum(p[0] for p in other['boundary'])//len(other['boundary'])
            cc = sum(p[1] for p in other['boundary'])//len(other['boundary'])
            print(f"  {other['color']} {other['pixels']}px at ({cr},{cc})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
